# volcenginecc_vefaas_function (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::VEFAAS::Function



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `async_task_config` (Attributes) Asynchronous task configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--async_task_config))
- `code_size` (Number) Code package size (MB).
- `code_size_limit` (Number) Code package size limit. SourceType=zip, CodeSizeLimit=15MB. SourceType=tos, CodeSizeLimit=256MB.
- `command` (String) Custom startup command for the instance (currently only supported in native/v1 runtime)
- `cpu_strategy` (String) Function CPU billing policy. When creating a microservice application type function, this field must be set to always, meaning at least one instance is running. Other function types do not support this field
- `creation_time` (String) Function creation time
- `dependency_install_status` (Attributes) Dependency installation task status. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dependency_install_status))
- `description` (String) Function description. Up to 1000 Unicode characters
- `enable_apmplus` (Boolean) Whether to enable application monitoring
- `enable_dependency_install` (Boolean) Enable function dependency installation. true: Enabled. The function installs dependencies after creation. false: Disabled. The function does not automatically install dependencies.
- `envs` (Attributes Set) Environment variables. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--envs))
- `exclusive_mode` (Boolean) Exclusive mode switch. true: disables multi-concurrency per instance, i.e., exclusive mode where a single instance can only handle one request at a time. false (default): enables multi-concurrency per instance, i.e., non-exclusive mode where a single instance can handle multiple requests at the same time. You can set the maximum concurrent requests per instance using MaxConcurrency.
- `function_id` (String) Function ID
- `initializer_sec` (Number) Function initialization timeout configuration
- `instance_type` (String) Instance type of the function instance. Null value: CPU instance. Non-null value: GPU instance.
- `last_update_time` (String) Function update time.
- `max_concurrency` (Number) Maximum concurrency per instance. Effective when ExclusiveMode = false. Range: 1–1000
- `memory_mb` (Number) Maximum memory per instance, unit: MiB. Range: 512–4096, in increments of 512. Default: 1024
- `name` (String) Function name. Function names must be unique within the same account. Function names support uppercase and lowercase English letters, numbers, hyphens (-), and underscores (_), with a length limit of 4–64 characters.
- `nas_storage` (Attributes) NAS file storage mount configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nas_storage))
- `owner` (String) Function owner (Account Id).
- `port` (Number) Custom listening port for the instance (currently only supported in native/v1 runtime)
- `project_name` (String) Project name associated with the function
- `request_timeout` (Number) Request timeout. Unit: seconds. Range: 1–900. Default: 30.
- `role` (String) IAM role bound to the function instance
- `runtime` (String) Function runtime. Values: golang/v1, native/v1, nativejava8/v1, node14/v1, node20/v1, nodeprime14/v1, python3.12/v1, python3.8/v1, python3.9/v1.
- `source` (String) Code source. Values: zip: Base64-encoded binary ZIP file; tos: string in the format bucket_name:object_key; image: image address in the format host/namespace/repo:tag
- `source_access_config` (Attributes) Image repository access configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_access_config))
- `source_type` (String) Code source type. Values: tos: object storage (TOS); zip: local compressed file; image: image repository (CR), supports Basic and Enterprise editions
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Function tags (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tls_config` (Attributes) TLS configuration for Log Service (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tls_config))
- `tos_mount_config` (Attributes) TOS object storage mount configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tos_mount_config))
- `triggers_count` (Number) Number of triggers for this function.
- `vpc_config` (Attributes) Private network VPC configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpc_config))

<a id="nestedatt--async_task_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `async_task_config`

Read-Only:

- `destination_config` (Attributes) Asynchronous task callback target configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config))
- `enable_async_task` (Boolean) Whether to enable asynchronous task
- `max_retry` (Number) Number of retry attempts for asynchronous task failures. Available values: 0–3

<a id="nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `async_task_config.destination_config`

Read-Only:

- `on_failure` (Attributes) Callback target configuration when the task fails (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config--on_failure))
- `on_success` (Attributes) Callback target configuration when the task succeeds (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config--on_success))

<a id="nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config--on_failure"></a>
### Nested Schema for `async_task_config.destination_config.on_failure`

Read-Only:

- `destination` (String) Specific callback target. Set the value to empty ("") to disable this callback


<a id="nestedatt--async_task_config--destination_config--on_success"></a>
### Nested Schema for `async_task_config.destination_config.on_success`

Read-Only:

- `destination` (String) Specific callback target. Set the value to empty ("") to disable this callback




<a id="nestedatt--dependency_install_status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dependency_install_status`

Read-Only:

- `create_time` (String) Task creation time.
- `finish_time` (String) Task completion time. The task is considered complete when it is in one of the following statuses: Canceled: Canceled. Timeout: Timed out. Failed: Failed. Succeeded: Succeeded.
- `status` (String) Task status. Possible values are as follows: Enqueued: Queued. Dequeued: Dequeued. InProgress: In progress. Canceling/Canceled: Canceling/Canceled. Timeout: Timed out. Failed: Failed. Succeeded: Succeeded.


<a id="nestedatt--envs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `envs`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Environment variable key. 1–63 characters; can include letters, numbers, and underscores (_), but cannot start with a number. Key must be unique within the same function
- `value` (String) Environment variable value


<a id="nestedatt--nas_storage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nas_storage`

Read-Only:

- `enable_nas` (Boolean) Enable NAS storage mount. true: enabled, store data in NAS. false: disabled.
- `nas_configs` (Attributes Set) NAS storage configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nas_storage--nas_configs))

<a id="nestedatt--nas_storage--nas_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nas_storage.nas_configs`

Read-Only:

- `file_system_id` (String) NAS file system ID.
- `gid` (Number) User group in the file system. Customization is not currently supported. If this parameter is provided, its value is 1000 (consistent with the function run user gid)
- `local_mount_path` (String) Function local mount directory. Length: 1–128 characters, must start with “/”, supports uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (  - . _ ~ / : @ = + ? #).
- `mount_point_id` (String) NAS mount point ID
- `remote_path` (String) Remote directory in the file system. Length: 1–128 characters, must start with “/”, supports uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (  - . _ ~ / : @ = + ? #)
- `uid` (Number) The user in the file system cannot be customized for now. If this parameter is provided, the value must be 1000 (consistent with the function run user uid).



<a id="nestedatt--source_access_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source_access_config`

Read-Only:

- `password` (String) Image repository password
- `username` (String) Image repository username


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Function tag key
- `value` (String) Function tag value


<a id="nestedatt--tls_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tls_config`

Read-Only:

- `enable_log` (Boolean) TLS log feature toggle. true: enabled, function stdout/stderr logs will be collected to the specified log project and log topic in Log Service. false: disabled, logs will not be collected
- `tls_project_id` (String) TLS log project ID
- `tls_topic_id` (String) TLS log topic ID.


<a id="nestedatt--tos_mount_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tos_mount_config`

Read-Only:

- `credentials` (Attributes) AKSK with TOS domain access permission. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tos_mount_config--credentials))
- `enable_tos` (Boolean) Enable TOS storage mount.
- `mount_points` (Attributes Set) TOS storage configuration list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tos_mount_config--mount_points))

<a id="nestedatt--tos_mount_config--credentials"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tos_mount_config.credentials`

Read-Only:

- `access_key_id` (String) Account AccessKey ID
- `secret_access_key` (String) Account Secret Access Key


<a id="nestedatt--tos_mount_config--mount_points"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tos_mount_config.mount_points`

Read-Only:

- `bucket_name` (String) TOS bucket name.
- `bucket_path` (String) Mounted TOS Bucket path.
- `endpoint` (String) TOS access domain name.
- `local_mount_path` (String) Function local mount directory.
- `read_only` (Boolean) Function local directory access permission. After mounting a TOS bucket, whether the function's local mount directory is read-only. true: read-only; false (default): read/write



<a id="nestedatt--vpc_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpc_config`

Read-Only:

- `enable_shared_internet_access` (Boolean) Function public network access switch. Whether to access the public network via veFaaS VPC shared NAT gateway. Values: true: enabled, access public network via default network interface. Public outbound traffic fees apply. false: disabled, function cannot access public network via default network interface.
- `enable_vpc` (Boolean) Whether the function enables private network access
- `security_group_ids` (Set of String) Security group ID
- `subnet_ids` (Set of String) Subnet ID
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. If the VPC ID is an empty string, it means the current VPC configuration will be deleted
